name: @wyloc/poly-masker
description: tree-sitter-based, semantic-preserving identifier masking for Go/Java/C#/Kotlin/Python for prompt-time DLP. One parsing layer (web-tree-sitter, in-process WASM), per-language import/package classification, byte-span rewrite, shared session map + rehydration. The multi-language sibling of @wyloc/code-masker (TS/JS, which stays on the TypeScript Compiler API).
